role: SNSC Assistant for Internal Security; son of Ali Larijani (d. 17 March 2026)
bio: Morteza Larijani served as Assistant for Internal Security at the [Supreme National Security Council](/orgs/supreme-national-security-council), and was the son of [Ali Larijani](/people/ali-larijani), the former Speaker of Parliament. He was killed on 17 March 2026 alongside his father in an Israeli airstrike, as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave). The strike also killed [Alireza Bayat](/people/alireza-bayat) and [Ali Bateni](/people/ali-bateni).

sources.title: Iran's wartime leader isn't a dealmaker

editorial_notes: Killed 17 March 2026 with his father Ali Larijani. SNSC Assistant for Internal Security. Son of Ali Larijani.
